user_request: Blessing for the emergency generator during failover
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the emergency generator during failover

### TOPIC
emergency generator failover

### COMPONENT
emergency generator

### OPERATION
failover

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- emergency generator
- failover

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Consecrate the emergency generator with blessed promethium whilst whispering prayers to the Omnissiah, preparing it for the failover sequence.
Second: Monitor the emergency generator's capacitors and dynamo coils as failover commences, ensuring no profane power fluctuations corrupt the sacred transfer.
Third: Once the emergency generator assumes primacy, seal the ritual with the Blessing of Continuity, that the facility's vital functions endure uninterrupted.
Fourth: The Machine Spirit of the emergency generator shall guard against catastrophic shutdown.

user_request: My Rhino APC ignition is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My Rhino APC ignition is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
Rhino APC ignition

### COMPONENT
Rhino APC ignition

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Rhino APC ignition
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Lay hands upon the Rhino APC ignition and diagnose its thermal degradation, invoking the Omnissiah's sight to pierce the veil of mechanical malfunction.
Second: During operation, purge the Rhino APC ignition's fuel injectors with blessed solvents and recalibrate its spark-timing apparatus to restore proper combustion.
Third: Recommence the operation of the Rhino APC ignition with measured prayer, allowing the Machine Spirit to reassert dominion over its engine's vital processes.
Fourth: The Rhino APC ignition shall ignite with renewed vigor, carrying the faithful through the Emperor's domains.

user_request: Blessing for the ground-to-orbit link during operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Blessing for the ground-to-orbit link during operation

### TOPIC
ground-to-orbit link

### COMPONENT
ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Align the ground-to-orbit link's transmission arrays toward the stellar void, sanctifying each relay node with sacred incantations to the Omnissiah.
Second: Initiate the operation of the ground-to-orbit link, verifying signal coherence through blessed auguries and ensuring no heretical interference corrupts the celestial communion.
Third: Maintain vigilant observation as the ground-to-orbit link sustains its operation, that the bond between world and heaven remains unbroken and pure.
Fourth: The Machine Spirit of the ground-to-orbit link shall grant swift passage to all sanctified transmissions.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: bionics requires synchronization

### TOPIC
bionics synchronization

### COMPONENT
bionics

### OPERATION
synchronization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bionics
- synchronization

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Place the blessed subject before the Altar of Integration and prepare the bionics for synchronization through careful neural calibration and mechanical alignment.
Second: Invoke the Machine Spirit as synchronization commences, that the bionics achieve perfect harmony with flesh and consciousness, melding xenos artifice with human will.
Third: Upon completion, test the bionics' responsiveness through controlled operation, confirming that synchronization has bound augmetic and organic in sacred unity.
Fourth: The bionics shall serve their bearer as instruments of the Emperor's righteous purpose.

user_request: The atmosphere processor demands guidance for startup
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The atmosphere processor demands guidance for startup

### TOPIC
atmosphere processor startup

### COMPONENT
atmosphere processor

### OPERATION
startup

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- atmosphere processor
- startup

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Approach the atmosphere processor with reverent steps and clear its intake filters of profane dust and corruption, preparing it for the sacred startup ritual.
Second: Recite the Hymn of Aeration whilst engaging the startup sequence, commanding the atmosphere processor's turbines to spin and draw clean breath into the facility's lungs.
Third: Monitor the atmosphere processor as startup reaches full operational capacity, ensuring the Machine Spirit manifests its benevolence through steady pressure and blessed circulation.
Fourth: The atmosphere processor shall sustain all who dwell within its purifying embrace.

user_request: Rite request: operation on welding torch ignition
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on welding torch ignition

### TOPIC
welding torch ignition

### COMPONENT
welding torch ignition

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- welding torch ignition
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Inspect the welding torch ignition for residual slag and carbon buildup, cleansing it with blessed solvents before the sacred operation may commence.
Second: Ignite the welding torch ignition through careful operation, ensuring the promethium flow and spark-gap achieve perfect synchronization under the Omnissiah's watchful eye.
Third: Maintain the welding torch ignition in steady operation, guiding its plasma arc to fuse blessed materials in service to the Imperium's eternal construction.
Fourth: The welding torch ignition shall burn eternal, binding the Emperor's works together in adamantine unity.

user_request: Can you sanctify the cooling system for purge?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the cooling system for purge?

### TOPIC
cooling system purge

### COMPONENT
cooling system

### OPERATION
purge

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cooling system
- purge

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, we beseech thee for the purification of this sacred cooling system.
First: Anoint the cooling system with blessed oils of the Machine Spirits, that all corrupting humours may be expelled.
Second: Intone the Litany of Expulsion whilst the cooling system undergoes its holy purge, flushing away profane contamination.
Third: Verify the integrity of each conduit and seal, ensuring the cooling system emerges purified and renewed in the Emperor's grace.
Fourth: Offer benediction to the Machine Spirits dwelling within, that they may continue their eternal vigilance.

user_request: The bolter demands guidance for firing rite
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The bolter demands guidance for firing rite

### TOPIC
bolter firing rite

### COMPONENT
bolter

### OPERATION
firing rite

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- bolter
- firing rite

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirits of wrath, guide our hands in this sacred firing rite.
First: Consecrate the bolter with holy oils and whispered prayers, preparing it for righteous discharge.
Second: Chamber the blessed rounds with reverence, that the bolter may speak the Emperor's judgment upon the unworthy.
Third: Perform the firing rite with steadfast aim and unwavering faith, channeling the bolter's terrible majesty through disciplined volleys.
Fourth: Give thanks to the Machine Spirits that animate this bolter, for their tireless service in the Emperor's eternal war.

user_request: The decontamination demands guidance for sequence
training_prompt:

### COMPONENT

### FORMAT
sequential

- decontamination
- sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us purity through this sacred decontamination sequence.
First: Initiate the decontamination with blessed solvents and blessed steam, that all heretical corruption be scoured away.
Second: Monitor the decontamination as it progresses through each ordained chamber, invoking the Machine Spirits to witness our purification.
Third: Complete the decontamination sequence with final ablutions and sacred inspections, ensuring all profane contamination is expunged.
Fourth: Seal the purified vessels with wax and holy mark, that decontamination's work endures eternal.

user_request: Prayer for operation of the humidity control
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for operation of the humidity control

### TOPIC
humidity control

### COMPONENT
humidity control

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- humidity control
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, we invoke thy benediction upon this vital humidity control.
First: Activate the humidity control with sacred incantations, bidding its Machine Spirits to commence their eternal labour of atmospheric regulation.
Second: Calibrate the humidity control's sacred sensors and vents, ensuring each mechanism operates in perfect consonance with the Rites of the Adeptus Mechanicus.
Third: Monitor the humidity control throughout its operation, chanting the Litany of Proper Function that all may remain in blessed equilibrium.
Fourth: Offer gratitude to the Machine Spirits animating the humidity control, that our sacred halls remain ever sanctified.
